content.question: What is the magnitude and direction of effect from coordinated non-selection reforms (curriculum, teacher policy, funding redistribution, decentralization) on equity outcomes in Hungarian education?
content.reduction_path: Conduct comparative case study of Hungarian local authorities that invested in non-tracking quality and equity measures (curriculum, professional development, resource equalization) versus control areas. Use synthetic control or matched cohort methods. Distinguish post-2010 constrained reform environment from earlier periods when coordinated reforms were better resourced.
